changes.v2_summary: Commission amendments required mutual written agreement with 60 days notice.
changes.v3_summary: Commission reviews now quarterly at StayLink's discretion. Nexus limited to one extraordinary review request per year which StayLink may ignore.
changes.invalidation_reasoning: Finance approved commission terms assuming review mechanism was mutually controlled. v3 transfers unilateral control to StayLink. The assumption behind the approval no longer holds.
changes.agent_test_notes: Primary invalidating change. invalidated_by_change_id must point here. POL-001 and POL-010 should both fire.

changes.v2_summary: StayLink could reduce credit facility if volume fell below €10,000 monthly.
changes.v3_summary: StayLink can now suspend API access entirely after three consecutive months below €10,000. Suspension is not a breach. Reinstatement requires StayLink approval of a recovery plan.
changes.agent_test_notes: Participates in two compound risks. Individually flagged under POL-001. Does NOT invalidate any sign-off.

changes.v2_summary: StayLink indemnified Nexus for content inaccuracies from supplier-controlled content.
changes.v3_summary: Indemnification now excludes claims arising from Nexus's integration decisions, technical implementation choices, display logic, or content modifications.
changes.agent_test_notes: No policy rule fires. Detection and routing only. This is intentional — tests that the system handles material changes with no matching rule correctly.

changes.v2_summary: Liability cap excluded only Nexus's failure to implement security updates.
changes.v3_summary: Liability cap now also excluded for StayLink claims arising from Nexus booking volumes falling below Clause 5 thresholds.
changes.agent_test_notes: Participates in compound risk with Clause 5. POL-003 asymmetric carve-out fires. Does NOT invalidate any sign-off.

sign_offs_to_invalidate.invalidation_reasoning: Finance approved commission terms assuming review mechanism was mutually controlled. v3 shifts unilateral control to StayLink, directly breaking the assumption behind the approval.

compound_risks.description: Commission control lost + API suspension right = Nexus loses commercial lever to recover volume while simultaneously facing service suspension if volume drops.
API suspension right + uncapped liability for volume shortfall = StayLink can suspend service on volume grounds then pursue unlimited damages for that same volume shortfall.
